key_points: Discriminant completely determines the nature of roots
Quadratic equations may have real, equal, or no real roots
Quadratic formula works for all types of equations
Graph of quadratic equation is a parabola
Roots of quadratic equation correspond to x-intercepts of graph
exam_tips: Use formula when factorisation is not possible
Graph touching x-axis indicates equal roots
Many HOTS questions focus on nature of roots, not values
